programme.desc: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest
programme.desc: Today on Stoked On Fishing, we head offshore on the Stoked On Fishing Charters 35-foot Everglades with an All-Star crew searching for bluefin tuna. We take out Okuma Fishing Tackles President Doug and John, head of product development. We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. This trip was absolutely nuts, with the best Blue Fin Tuna fishing we have seen in Sothern California all year.

programme.desc: Based on Arkady Fiedler's bestseller, Squadron 303 relates the true story of the Polish pilots who were heroes in the Battle of Britain. Jan Zumbach is recovering from a plane crash in a sanatorium when WWII breaks out. The Nazi onslaught forces him to escape from occupied Poland. A similar fate awaits the heroic flight instructor, Witold Urbanowicz. Both make their way to Great Britain and carry on the fight against the Nazi Luftwaffe. Quickly, their heroism and skill catch the attention of commanders, and an elite, Polish fighter squadron is created: Squadron 303. At first they are underestimated and mocked, but thanks to the outstanding patriotism and bravery of its members, the squadron quickly wins respect.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Southern California Bluefin Tuna Fishing at Its Finest

We also have on board Colin and his wife, Amanda from Grundens, and our friend Toby from Mag Bay Lures and Mag Bay Resort down in Baja, Mexico. programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter - Fish Out of Water: Dairy Farming vs Kayak Fishing
programme.desc: You can't milk a fish, but you can milk a cow! In this episode, Mike takes dairy farmer, Quintin Cook, fishing for his first time in a kayak. After an exciting day on the water, Quintin shows Mike the ropes of being a dairy farmer. Which dream job is more fun for them? Check out all the fun!

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep106: Australia
programme.desc: From the sand bottom perfection of Australia’s East Coast to the rugged and heaving waves of the West, this episode rides along with former professional surfer and all round legend Dean “Dingo” Morrison as he guides viewers through what surfing is like in his home country…lots of tubes and good times!

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: On this episode, Laura takes a trip to White Oak Pastures in Georgia to meet with pioneer and visionary, Will Harris. After two decades of monocultural farming, Will took his multi-generation farm into a completely new direction by turning it into a regenerative farm. Through trials and tribulations, Will and his family are paving the way for regenerative agriculture and educating the public on the importance of food education.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to close the deal on Beyond the Close! Join us for the grand finale and winner celebration episode, where we'll reveal the triumphant super-agent who has risen to the very top of the competition. But that's not all. Get ready to hear firsthand from the contestants themselves as they reflect on their 90-day journey and share their growth, learnings, and future aspirations. It's a night of triumph, tears, and unforgettable moments as we bid farewell to the most thrilling season yet. And as if that wasn't enough, we have a very special guest in store. The one and only Christine Quinn, star of Netflix's Selling Sunset, will be joining us for the festivities. She'll be sharing her insights on the industry and giving us a glimpse into what it takes to be a top realtor. But wait, there's more! We'll be taking you on an exclusive tour of some of Miami's most luxurious properties, hosted by none other than some of America's top developers and agents. So sit back, relax, and get ready to be transported beyond the close.

programme.title: Country Ball

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: This week, host Laura visits a family who has taken backyard farming to a whole new level. The Killpatrick family led by husband and father Michael is paving the way for the next generation of regenerative farming. This farm sprouted from the 2020 pandemic and in a few short years has become a pivotal cornerstone of their city community for all things holistic and organic. The Farm on Central is proving what can be accomplished with dedication to the future of farming.

programme.title: S2E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.

programme.title: S3E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.

programme.title: S1E1 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro team up to show the game from the perspective of some of hockey’s greatest players. On NHL After Dark, Detroit Red Wings forward Tomáš Tatar puts his street hockey skills to the test with challenging stickhandling drills. Pittsburgh Penguins center Evgeni Malkin, three-time Stanley Cup champion and 2012 Hart Memorial Trophy winner, showcases his smooth hands and technical mastery as he takes on drills that look simple but are far from easy. Chicago Blackhawks defender Duncan Keith elevates target practice to an art form while outmaneuvering his opponents with precision and speed.

programme.title: S1E2 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro join forces to capture the game through the eyes of hockey’s best players. Vancouver Canucks duo Daniel and Henrik Sedin showcase their legendary on-ice chemistry through a series of unconventional drills. Philadelphia Flyers center Claude Giroux returns for his second episode, using lightning-fast hands and impressive physicality to outmaneuver his opponents. Colorado Avalanche forward Gabriel Landeskog powers through defenders and scores hard-hitting goals that put our cameras to the ultimate test. New Jersey Devils goalie Cory Schneider takes on unique drills that double the challenge and push his skills to the limit.

programme.title: S1E1 Tour
programme.desc: Pursuing the Tour de France, one of the most physically demanding sporting events in the world, covers over 3,535 kilometers in just three weeks. Every young cyclist dreams of competing in this prestigious race, but only nine riders from each team make the cut. Young cyclist Adam Yates is giving everything he has to prove he belongs on cycling’s biggest stage. 2016 Tour de France winner Chris Froome reflects on the long and grueling journey to victory, while former professional cyclists and Tour de France veterans Jens Voigt, Christian Vande Velde, and Haimar Zubeldia reveal what it truly takes to compete at the highest level.
